metadata.title: Client Not Paying Invoice | FlowDockr Guide
metadata.description: A practical sequence to follow when a client misses payment deadlines.

hero.title: Client not paying invoice? Use a structured reminder sequence.
hero.description: Protect relationship and cash flow with clear terms, clear deadlines, and escalation logic.

usage.label: Playbook
usage.title: 3-step late-payment workflow
usage.description: Escalate tone gradually while keeping evidence and next steps explicit.

items.title: Friendly reminder
items.description: Reference invoice number, due date, and payment method.

items.title: Firm follow-up
items.description: Set a specific response and payment deadline.

items.title: Escalation notice
items.description: Pause deliverables and ask for confirmation of payment timeline.

cta.title: Use the payment reminder template now.
cta.description: Send a clear message in minutes instead of rewriting from scratch.
